scenario: Married filing jointly: retired railroad worker (RRB Tier 1 SSEB $10,000) and government-worker spouse with pension $38,000 and savings bond interest $2,500 — SSEB partially taxable per IRC §86 Worksheet
source: IRS Pub 17 TY2025, Chapter 7: Social Security and Equivalent Railroad Retirement Benefits, Example 3, p. 64–65 (income amounts adapted; SSEB taxability per IRC §86)
